zh.lifeSummary: 當Joyce Engaine於1340年出生在英國貝德福爾可普爾時，她的父親John Engaine38歲，母親Joan Peverel36歲。她於大約1355年與John De Goldington在英國結婚。她去世於1387年在英國英格蘭貝德福爾帕文哈姆享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joyce Engaine于1340年出生在英国貝德福爾可普爾时，她的父亲John Engaine38岁，母亲Joan Peverel36岁。她于大约1355年与John De Goldington在英国结婚。她去世于1387年在英国英格兰貝德福爾帕文哈姆享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Joyce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Apparently from the Norman male name Josce (Middle English Josse), which in turn is from Jodocus, a Latinized form of a Breton name, Iodoc, meaning ‘lord’, borne by a 7th-century Breton saint. The name was in use in England among Breton followers of William the Conqueror. However, although this was fairly common as a male given name in the Middle Ages, it had virtually died out by the 14th century. There is evidence of its use as a girl's name from the 16th century onwards in parishes with strong Puritan links, which suggests that it may have been associated with the vocabulary word joy; see Joy . It was strongly revived in the 19th century under the influence of popular fiction. It is borne by characters in Mrs Henry Wood's East Lynne ( 1861 ) and Edna Lyall's In the Golden Days ( 1885 ). Modern use may well have been influenced also by the common Irish surname derived from the medieval Norman male name. See also Joss .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joyce Engaine was born in 1340, in Cople, Bedfordshire, England, her father, John Engaine, was 38 and her mother, Joan Peverel, was 36. She married John De Goldington about 1355, in England. She died in 1387, in Pavenham, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joyce Engaine est née en 1340, à Cople, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Engaine, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Joan Peverel, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé John De Goldington environ 1355, à Angleterre. Elle est décédée en 1387, à Pavenham, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joyce Engaine 1340 in Cople, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Engaine 38 und ihre Mutter Joan Peverel 36. Sie hat um 1355 in England John De Goldington geheiratet. Sie starb 1387 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Pavenham, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joyce Engaine è nata il nel 1340 nel Cople, Bedfordshire, England, sua padre, John Engaine, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Joan Peverel, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato John De Goldington circa 1355, nel England. Morì nel 1387, nel Pavenham, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joyce Engaineが1340年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアコプルで生まれた時，父John Engaineは38歳，母Joan Peverelは36歳であった。約1355年にイギリスでJohn De Goldingtonと結婚した。彼女は1387年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアプエイベンハムで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joyce Engaine(이)가 1340년 영국 베드퍼드실르 코플에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Engaine(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Peverel(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 대략 1355년 영국에서 John De Goldington(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1387년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 파븐함에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Pabenham, Bedfordshire, England: Pavenham, Beadafordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joyce Engaine nasceu em 1340, em Cople, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Engaine, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Joan Peverel, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com John De Goldington aproximadamente 1355, em Inglaterra. Ela faleceu em 1387, em Pavenham, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joyce Engaine родилась в 1340 г. в местности копл, бедфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Engaine было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Peverel, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John De Goldington около 1355 г. в местности Англия. Она умерла в 1387 г. в местности павенам, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joyce Engaine nació en 1340, en Cople, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Engaine, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Joan Peverel, tenía 36 años. Se casó con John De Goldington aproximadamente 1355, en Inglaterra. Murió en 1387, en Pavenham, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 47 años.
